three_concept_sets_silhouettes.selection_bar: Prefer sets where Started vs Growing and Balanced vs Full differ by shape class at 16px, not only opacity or weight.

sets.name: Stationery path
sets.thesis: Paper frame → first mark → branching effort → even triad → done check.

sets.name: Presence path
sets.thesis: Ghost trio → one solid center → asymmetric fills → matched fills → triad inside frame.

sets.name: Light path
sets.thesis: Whisper arcs → one bright arc → uneven peaks → matched arcs → complete disk.

theme_aligned_concepts.tone: Warm ink #5C5346, calm stationery — not dashboard or analytics chrome.
theme_aligned_concepts.note: Earlier single-family rows; page 07 supersedes for silhouette distinctness review.

families.name: Paper marks
families.description: Gentle diagonal ink ticks; Full uses soft filled dots.

families.name: Breath / presence
families.description: Soft rounded ellipses; progression through fill and outline.

families.name: Morning light
families.description: Soft upward arcs (light on paper); thicker stroke on Full.

selected_concept.name: ThreeBars
selected_concept.rationale: Legacy exploration; prefer theme-aligned families on page 06 for Grace Notes tone.

statuses.name: Empty
statuses.rule: Exactly 0/0/0 across Gratitudes, Needs, and People in Mind.

statuses.name: Started
statuses.rule: At least one section is > 0, and all three sections are < 3.

statuses.name: Growing
statuses.rule: At least one section is >= 3, and at least one section is < 3.

statuses.name: Balanced
statuses.rule: All three sections are >= 3, but not all three are 5.

rendering_rules.icon_style: Monochrome only, tint applied in app.
